name: Alex Rivera
tagline: I build things for the web — from pixel-perfect interfaces to resilient backend systems.
bio:
I'm a full-stack developer with 5+ years of experience turning ideas into elegant, scalable digital products. I care deeply about the craft: clean code, thoughtful design, and experiences that feel effortless.

When I'm not coding, I'm likely exploring photography, reading about systems design, or attempting to perfect my espresso technique.
